content: {"recommendations": [{"section_id": "s01", "section_title": "Intermittent Fasting Protocols and Metabolic Syndrome Definitions", "diagram_type": "comparison_matrix", "description": "Matrix comparing IF protocol families (TRE, ADF, 5:2, FMD) across dimensions of cycle length, caloric permissiveness, adherence difficulty, and evidence depth in metabolic-syndrome populations, anchored on the alternate-day fasting variant substantiated in the claims."}, {"section_id": "s03", "section_title": "Methodological Heterogeneity and GRADE Certainty", "diagram_type": "comparison_matrix", "description": "Matrix contrasting the three study-design categories in the retrieved evidence base: supervised RCT (108-adult MetS TRE trial), pragmatic RCT (54-adult community TRE trial), and real-world observational (LIFE Fasting Tracker cohort), across strengths, weaknesses, and endpoint coverage."}, {"section_id": "s05", "section_title": "Biological Mechanisms and Pathways", "diagram_type": "decision_tree", "description": "Branching diagram distinguishing the three mechanistic architectures the evidence leaves open: caloric-restriction only, timing-only, or synergistic/additive combination, each leading to different predicted long-term effect-size behavior."}, {"section_id": "s06", "section_title": "Clinical Implications and Research Priorities", "diagram_type": "ranking", "description": "Priority-ranked list of next-decade research targets: long-duration pragmatic trials, head-to-head comparisons with continuous energy restriction and pharmacotherapy, and population-scale implementation studies."}]}
